name: Danish Intelligence Core
longDescription: Danish Intelligence Core is a unified service that handles everything Danish for your media stack in one place. It replaces three separate containers (dksubs-proxy, ob-proxy, and danskarr) with a single, high-performance engine
description: One-click setup: The service can auto-discover Prowlarr, Radarr, and Sonarr API keys from mounted Cosmos config folders, rewires legacy dksubs-proxy URLs, paints Custom Formats and Quality Profiles, and exposes /status for post-install checks. OldBoys credentials are optional.
